query:
-- property_owners: إضافة nationalAddress, companyId, commercialRegNo
ALTER TABLE property_owners 
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS nationalAddress VARCHAR(255) NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS companyId INT NULL,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS commercialRegNo VARCHAR(30) NULL;

-- maintenance_requests: إضافة ownerApprovalRequired, completionImages
ALTER TABLE maintenance_requests
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS ownerApprovalRequired TINYINT(1) DEFAULT 0,
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS completionImages JSON NULL;

-- brokers: إضافة companyId
ALTER TABLE brokers
  ADD COLUMN IF NOT EXISTS companyId INT NULL;
